jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Sankara Nethralaya
jsonLd.description:
Sankara Nethralaya, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sankara Nethralaya:
Sankara Nethralaya is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya!
